title: Visceral Poem 12
shortDescription: A visceral poem where language meets ink and emotion.
longStory: Born in transit — on buses between cities, on planes between countries — each Visceral Poem is a fragment of an inner landscape. Available as a handmade original or as a signed digital print, with an optional frame.
